nasb.text: Also they shall not shave their heads, yet they shall not let their locks grow long; they shall only trim the hair of their heads.

esv.text: They shall not shave their heads or let their locks grow long; they shall surely trim the hair of their heads.

cnv.text: 他們不可剃頭，也不可留長頭髮，只可剪短頭髮。

ccb.text: 他们不可剃光头，也不可留长头发，只可修剪头发。
